overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a rainy futuristic metropolis. The player crosses wet intersections with flying cars overhead, walks along narrow sidewalks lined with industrial buildings and digital billboards, and encounters pedestrians in a dense urban environment with persistent heavy rain and overcast lighting.

turns right from open intersection onto narrow sidewalk alongside tall building

white striped pedestrian crossing lines on wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rainy futuristic intersection with a prominent 'PURE OVERKILL' billboard visible ahead. The player crosses the wet street as a red futuristic car drives past, then turns onto a narrow sidewalk beside a tall brick building with an overhead bridge structure visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow city sidewalk with industrial metal wall and street lamps

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet concrete sidewalk between the street and a tall industrial building

tall modern street lamp with orange light fixture
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
tall futuristic skyscrapers visible through the hazy rain in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow, rain-soaked sidewalk flanked by a rusted metal industrial wall on the right and a busy street on the left. Digital billboards and modern street lamps line the path while distant futuristic towers loom through the hazy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching intersection with pedestrian activity

events.description: pedestrians appear walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
large male pedestrian passes close to camera on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk and passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: woman in pink athletic wear jogging along the sidewalk
large man in vest walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: red rectangular sign with 'Hanford' text mounted on pole

segments.scene_description: As the camera approaches the next intersection, pedestrians appear on the sidewalk including a woman jogging and a large man walking toward the camera. The red 'Hanford' sign becomes visible in the distance while the industrial metal wall continues alongside the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with hanford signage and crosswalk

events.description: approaches traffic light at hanford intersection and enters crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection corner and stepping onto the crosswalk to cross the street

entered.detail: traffic light showing red signal at intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the intersection marked by the red 'Hanford' sign, turns left, and steps onto the crosswalk. The industrial wall gives way to an open street view with traffic lights and distant futuristic buildings visible through the heavy rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-drenched futuristic district, moving from a wide intersection into a narrow industrial corridor before opening back up to the city streets. It begins by crossing a wet intersection beneath a prominent Pure Overkill billboard as a red futuristic car speeds past, before the camera turns onto a cramped sidewalk beside a tall brick building. As the path continues, the environment shifts into a corridor flanked by a rusted metal industrial wall and a line of digital billboards, with distant towers looming through the hazy rain. The scene then becomes more crowded as the camera approaches a new intersection, passing a jogging woman and a large man while a red Hanford sign emerges in the distance. Finally, the camera turns left at the Hanford sign and steps onto a crosswalk, where the industrial walls give way to an open view of traffic lights and towering skyscrapers shrouded in heavy rain.
